description: Access information about installed SuiteApps and Bundles, check if a specific bundle or SuiteApp is installed.

methods.name: isBundleInstalled
methods.description: Returns true if the specified bundle is installed in the current account.

methods.name: isSuiteAppInstalled
methods.description: Returns true if the specified SDF SuiteApp is installed.

methods.name: listInstalledBundles
methods.description: Returns a list of bundles that are installed in the current account.

methods.name: listInstalledSuiteApps
methods.description: Returns a list of SDF SuiteApps that are installed.

methods.name: listBundlesContainingScripts
methods.description: Returns the IDs for bundles that contain the specified scripts.

params.name: options.scriptIds
params.description: Array of script IDs to look up

methods.name: listSuiteAppsContainingScripts
methods.description: Returns the IDs for SDF SuiteApps that contain the specified scripts.

params.name: options.scriptIds
params.description: Array of script IDs to look up
